name: St. Francis Barber Shop
seoDescription: St. Francis Barber Shop is an old-fashioned, walk-in barber shop in Rincon Valley, Santa Rosa — men's cuts from flat tops to zero fades, plus shaves and beard trims by licensed barbers since 1963.

sections.heading: Your friendly neighborhood barber since 1963
sections.subheading: An old-fashioned, walk-in barber shop on Calistoga Road — flat tops to zero fades, shaves, and beard trims by licensed barbers, at a price that's still reasonable.

items.title: Walk right in
items.body: No app, no appointment. Stop by Tuesday through Saturday and grab the next open chair.

items.title: Licensed barbers
items.body: Every cut, shave, and trim is done by a licensed barber who's done it a thousand times.

items.title: Old-fashioned, fair price
items.body: A classic cut at a reasonable price — the way a barber shop is supposed to be.

items.title: Men's Haircuts
items.description: All forms of men's cuts, from classic flat tops to clean zero fades, by licensed barbers.

items.title: Fades & Tapers
items.description: Sharp fades and tapers, blended the way you like to wear it.

items.title: Shaves
items.description: A traditional barbershop shave, done the old-fashioned way.

items.title: Beard Trims
items.description: Beard shaping and trims to keep your look tidy between cuts.

sections.heading: On Calistoga Road since 1963
body: St. Francis Barber Shop has been the friendly neighborhood barber in Rincon Valley since 1963. You'll find it in the St. Francis/Safeway center, right at the corner of Highway 12 and Calistoga Road, in the breezeway with plenty of parking out front.

It's a small, old-fashioned shop — a handful of chairs and licensed barbers who handle everything from flat tops to zero fades, plus straight shaves and beard trims. No frills, no fuss, just a good cut at a fair price. Walk in when it suits you.
highlights: Easy parking in the St. Francis/Safeway center

items.quote: The barbers at the shop are very good at what they do. The price is reasonable.

sections.heading: In the St. Francis center, corner of Hwy 12 & Calistoga
sections.body: Right in the breezeway near the UPS Store, with plenty of parking. Closed Sundays and Mondays.

sections.heading: Need a cut?
sections.body: Find us at 120 Calistoga Rd in Santa Rosa. Walk in Tue–Sat, 9:00am–5:30pm, or call ahead.

sections.heading: Cuts, shaves & trims
sections.subheading: Old-fashioned barbering by licensed barbers — walk in Tuesday through Saturday.

It's a small, old-fashioned shop — a handful of chairs and licensed barbers who handle everything from flat tops to zero fades, plus straight shaves and beard trims. No frills, no fuss, just a good cut at a fair price. Walk in when it suits you.

sections.heading: Get in touch
sections.blurb: Find St. Francis Barber Shop at 120 Calistoga Rd, Santa Rosa, CA 95409, or call (707) 539-3475. Walk-ins welcome Tuesday through Saturday.

flags: Ownership ambiguity: older reviews name owner 'Jayne'; a 2023 source claims the location was sold and rebranded 'Mr. Barber Shop' under new owner 'Jason'. Built under the still-live St. Francis identity, no owner named — confirm current ownership/business name before sending.
Phone (707) 539-3475 vs an alternate (707) 470-6781 seen on some listings — verify the current number.
No real photos: the live site is JS-rendered with no extractable images and none could be verified as theirs — built photo-free editorial (barber motif). Add real shop/cut photos before sending.
Single review quote (unattributed) and no confirmed star rating/review count — pull 2–3 verified Google/Yelp reviews.
